stemHtml: Choose the correct statement in regard to HLA Routes T16 and T213.

options.a: They are not part of the OTS but require 2 LRNs.
options.b: They are not part of the OTS but require LRNs.
options.c: They are random routes and require 2 LRNs.
options.d: They are random routes and require 1 LRNs.
